description_long: This is a rugged, dark green SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design reminiscent of classic off-road vehicles. The vehicle features a prominent front grille, round headlights, and a sturdy black bull bar for added protection. A large, black roof rack spans the length of the roof, suitable for carrying extra cargo or equipment. The rear section is covered with a black, soft-top canopy, suggesting versatility for transporting goods or passengers. The SUV sits on black steel wheels with off-road tires, and the body panels are accented by visible door handles and side mirrors. The overall appearance is robust and functional, ideal for both urban and off-road environments.
description: A dark green, boxy SUV with a black roof rack, soft-top rear canopy, and rugged off-road features. It has a utilitarian design with black steel wheels and protective front bull bar.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, round headlights, bull bar, and the full width of the roof rack.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long body, four doors, black steel wheels, and the extended roof rack.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spare tire mount, rear lights, and the black canopy covering the cargo area.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the canopy's shape, rear section, and partial side profile.
attribute_wheel_design: black steel wheels with a simple, solid center and no visible spokes
